message:
fix(lexical): use single Tantivy writer thread for rebuild predictability, plus formatting cleanup

cass_compat.rs — Switch from index.writer(50_000_000) to
index.writer_with_num_threads(1, 50_000_000) for CASS lexical rebuilds.
The single-producer single-worker configuration bounds memory usage and
makes rebuild checkpoint timing predictable on very large session
corpora. Previously, Tantivy's default thread count (num_cpus) could
cause memory spikes during large batch commits when multiple indexing
threads each accumulated their own segments.

search.rs — Formatting cleanup: break long chained method calls and
assertion messages across multiple lines for readability. No behavioral
change.

job_queue.rs — Formatting cleanup: break long chained method calls and
assertion macros across multiple lines. No behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
